mapper.select: SELECT BOARD_CD as "boardCd" , BOARD_NAME FROM BOARD_TYPE

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS RNUM , T1.* FROM ( SELECT BOARD_NO, BOARD_TITLE , USER_NAME AS BOARD_WRITER , COUNT, CREATE_DATE FROM BOARD B LEFT JOIN MEMBER M ON BOARD_WRITER = USER_NO WHERE B.STATUS = 'Y' AND BOARD_CD = #{boardCd}
AND
BOARD_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
USER_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
BOARD_CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
(BOARD_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR BOARD_CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
ORDER BY BOARD_NO DESC) T1 ) WHERE RNUM BETWEEN #{offset} AND #{limit}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOARD B LEFT JOIN MEMBER M ON BOARD_WRITER = USER_NO WHERE B.STATUS = 'Y' AND BOARD_CD = #{boardCd}
AND
BOARD_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
USER_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
BOARD_CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
(BOARD_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR BOARD_CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_BNO.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO BOARD VALUES(#{boardNo} , #{boardTitle}, #{boardContent}, #{boardCd}, #{boardWriter}, DEFAULT, DEFAULT, DEFAULT)
mapper.select: SELECT BOARD_NO, BOARD_WRITER, BOARD_TITLE, BOARD_CONTENT, COUNT, CREATE_DATE, USER_NAME FROM BOARD B LEFT JOIN MEMBER M ON BOARD_WRITER = USER_NO WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo} AND B.STATUS = 'Y'
SELECT * FROM BOARD_IMG WHERE REF_BNO = #{boardNo} ORDER BY IMG_LEVEL
mapper.update: UPDATE BOARD_IMG SET ORIGIN_NAME = #{originName}, CHANGE_NAME = #{changeName}, WHERE BOARD_IMG_NO = #{boardImgNo}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM BOARD_IMG WHERE BOARD_IMG_NO IN (${deleteList})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO REPLY VALUES ( SEQ_RNO.NEXTVAL, #{replyContent}, #{refBno}, #{replyWriter}, DEFAULT, DEFAULT )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM REPLY WHERE REF_BNO = #{boardNo} AND STATUS = 'Y'
